names.name: ZIRCONIUM
names.naming_org: Microsoft other, MISP Galaxy, MITRE ATT&CK

names.name: APT31
names.naming_org: Microsoft other, MISP Galaxy, MITRE ATT&CK

overview.text: ZIRCONIUM is a threat group operating out of China, active since at least 2017, that has targeted individuals associated with the 2020 US presidential election and prominent leaders in the international affairs community.(Citation: Microsoft Targeting Elections September 2020)(Citation: Check Point APT31 February 2021)
